issue.title: ci: avoid release signing in PR build checks

comment.body: @GeorgeChernyshov in regard to https://github.com/tekkura/sr-android/pull/181#issuecomment-4055746701 it looks like we can either pass all those secrets to the build check every time or just require them in in the automated releases workflow. I'd prefer the latter, and it might speed up build checks as well. So I'm proposing this PR to merge to main, then rebase your milestone branch on this so your PR can pass the build check before merging. Let me know your thoughts.
